go_rule: R5-A primary must be no worse than deterministic_train on val Macro-F1/Acc, preferably >= +0.3pp, reduce image conflict telemetry, have net-positive flip audit, and beat aux-weight, generic PCGrad/CAGrad, random-sign and same-budget controls.
no_go_rule: No-Go if primary is below deterministic, only improves calibration, or any generic/control variant matches or beats it.
